# ConvertMyStuff

> Free online converters, calculators, and utility tools. Most tools run in your browser; basic use requires no account.

Canonical site: https://convertmystuff.com

## Primary entry points

- Home: https://convertmystuff.com/
- All tools: https://convertmystuff.com/tools/
- Guides (in-depth explainers): https://convertmystuff.com/guides/
- Resources (topic articles linked to tools): https://convertmystuff.com/resources/

## Category hubs

- Developer tools: https://convertmystuff.com/developer-tools/
- Unit converters: https://convertmystuff.com/unit-converters/
- Finance calculators: https://convertmystuff.com/finance-calculators/
- Real estate calculators: https://convertmystuff.com/real-estate-calculators/
- Health & fitness calculators: https://convertmystuff.com/health-fitness-calculators/
- Construction calculators: https://convertmystuff.com/construction-calculators/
- Document tools: https://convertmystuff.com/document-tools/
- Image tools: https://convertmystuff.com/image-tools/
- Text tools: https://convertmystuff.com/text-tools/
- Marketing tools: https://convertmystuff.com/marketing-tools/

## Flagship tools (high-utility starting points)

- JSON to CSV: https://convertmystuff.com/developer-tools/json-to-csv/
- CSV to JSON: https://convertmystuff.com/developer-tools/csv-to-json/
- PDF merge: https://convertmystuff.com/document-tools/pdf-merge/
- PDF split: https://convertmystuff.com/document-tools/pdf-split/
- Compound interest calculator: https://convertmystuff.com/finance-calculators/compound-interest-calculator/
- Mortgage calculator pro: https://convertmystuff.com/finance-calculators/mortgage-calculator-pro/
- BMI calculator: https://convertmystuff.com/health-fitness-calculators/bmi-calculator/
- Rental deal analyzer: https://convertmystuff.com/real-estate-calculators/rental-deal-analyzer/
- Concrete calculator: https://convertmystuff.com/construction-calculators/concrete-calculator/
- Image resizer: https://convertmystuff.com/image-tools/image-resizer/

## Editorial policy

- One canonical URL per conversion or calculator (no numeric variation pages such as /5-acres-to-square-feet/).
- Tool interface appears above supporting content.
- Calculator results are informational estimates, not professional advice.
- Privacy: https://convertmystuff.com/privacy/
- Terms: https://convertmystuff.com/terms/
- About: https://convertmystuff.com/about/

## Sitemap

https://convertmystuff.com/sitemap.xml
